inputs.titre: Fondation de la Compagnie néerlandaise des Indes occidentales

reason: The image depicts a gathering of men around a map, seemingly planning a venture. The clothing (wide-brimmed hats with feathers, vests, breeches), the architecture (stone walls, arched windows), the lighting (candles), and the map itself all suggest a 17th-century setting appropriate for the founding of the Dutch West India Company. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms or fantasy elements. The overall atmosphere of anticipation and serious planning feels consistent with the historical event. There are some minor things, such as the cleanliness and condition of the clothes, which might be slightly idealized. However, the scene generally succeeds in conveying the appropriate historical context.
